results.justification: Diagnoses the phenomenon AQUEDUCT-GRADIENT aims to fix; no mechanism overlap.
Empirical correlation of performance with context length; no per-token gradient regularization mechanism.

DIRECT TWIN of per-token gradient manipulation for transformer training — addresses gradient conflicts/uniformity at TOKEN LEVEL (multi-task framing, but the artefact is token-position gradient handling).
Trains without skip; opposite of inverted-siphon bypass.
Skips middle layers via gate; bypass concept overlap but different artefact (compute skip vs gradient bypass).
Token-wise residual gating in decoder-only LMs — same artefact (per-position residual control) different goal (compute skip).
Long-context pretraining attention architecture targeting same problem (long-range coherence); different mechanism.
Alternative residual connection patterns; partial overlap.
